Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

consultant_options.label: A

tradeoff_bullets: protects access and share but consumes cash before delayed capacity arrives

consultant_options.label: B
consultant_options.title: Workforce resilience: recruit nurses before capacity constraints bind
tradeoff_bullets: spends cash and may lower workforce trust before delayed staffing relief arrives

consultant_options.label: C
consultant_options.title: Information-first: monitor an identified rival intelligence gap
tradeoff_bullets: costs AP and delays direct action; any signal remains partial

consultant_options.label: D
consultant_options.title: Public access pledge: commit to an access target
tradeoff_bullets: may reduce policy pressure but creates a visible follow-through obligation

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

workforce: Northlake Health: staffing deficit of 5 staff (4 nurses, 0 physicians, 1 admins) causes burnout.
Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

consultant_options.label: B

tradeoff_bullets: costs AP and delays direct action; any signal remains partial

consultant_options.label: D
consultant_options.title: Public access pledge: commit to an access target
tradeoff_bullets: may reduce policy pressure but creates a visible follow-through obligation

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

consultant_options.label: B

tradeoff_bullets: costs AP and delays direct action; any signal remains partial

consultant_options.label: D
consultant_options.title: Public access pledge: commit to an access target
tradeoff_bullets: may reduce policy pressure but creates a visible follow-through obligation

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

history.command: [Monitor { target: Northlake, depth: 1 }, Commit { pledge_type: Access, level: 1 }]

consultant_options.label: A
consultant_options.title: Defensive capacity: invest in staffed beds to protect access and share
tradeoff_bullets: protects access and share but consumes cash before delayed capacity arrives

consultant_options.label: B
consultant_options.title: Workforce resilience: recruit nurses before capacity constraints bind
tradeoff_bullets: spends cash and may lower workforce trust before delayed staffing relief arrives

consultant_options.label: C
consultant_options.title: Information-first: monitor an identified rival intelligence gap
tradeoff_bullets: costs AP and delays direct action; any signal remains partial

consultant_options.label: D
consultant_options.title: Public access pledge: commit to an access target
tradeoff_bullets: may reduce policy pressure but creates a visible follow-through obligation

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.

Recruitment lesson: nurse, physician, and admin hiring spends cash immediately, resolves after role-specific delays, and can lower workforce trust while added capacity is pending.

Capital project lesson: EHR Epic/Cerner, Tower, and Clinic Network projects consume Action Points and cash immediately, draw cash monthly over their duration (9 to 12 months), and are limited to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects. They are long-term strategic investments that require careful planning over the 24-month horizon.
Access pledge lesson: public access commitments build legitimacy, but the debrief reviews whether repeated pledges were paired with capacity, staffing, monitoring, or payer follow-through.
Decision quality and outcome quality remain separate: the MCP surface reports actor-visible observations plus committed transition summaries.
